purpose: Narrow the qwen uncached-throughput gap without rerunning the known 40-case timeout by producing one Promptfoo no-cache single-task surface for qwen/qwen3.5-9b@gpu_offload.

runtimeBefore.nvidiaSmi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Super with Max-Q Design, 8192 MiB total, 227 MiB used, 7761 MiB free, 0% utilization

runnerFix.reason: The first command showed EVAL_TASK_FILTER was recorded on the row but not passed into Promptfoo; stderr said Promptfoo started 40 test cases. Promptfoo eval help exposes --filter-metadata <key=value>, and suite tests use metadata.taskId.
runnerFix.change: When EVAL_TASK_FILTER is set, Promptfoo now receives --filter-metadata taskId=<taskFilter>. Default unfiltered behavior is unchanged.

prePatchAttempt.command: EVAL_PROMPTFOO_NO_CACHE=true; EVAL_TASK_FILTER=build-synthetic-smoke; EVAL_SMOKE_MODELS=qwen/qwen3.5-9b; EVAL_SMOKE_PROFILES=gpu_offload; EVAL_CELL_TIMEOUT_MS=300000; node scripts/run-matrix.mjs --smoke

cacheEvidence.note: The successful filtered row stderr does not retain the Cache is disabled banner because Promptfoo returned non-timeout errors; Stream 28 command set EVAL_PROMPTFOO_NO_CACHE=true and Promptfoo tokenUsage.cached is 0.

comparisonArtifacts.reason: The filtered run refreshed results/promptfoo-latest.json with qwen/qwen3.5-9b@gpu_offload and taskId build-synthetic-smoke, so compare and queue were meaningful for this surface.
comparisonArtifacts.caveat: All four local outputs were empty/error rows, so review queues are failure evidence rather than successful output quality evidence.

stream17CachedQwen.result: qwen/qwen3.5-9b@gpu_offload and tested qwen profiles tied at 7/40; durations around 6.8-7.0s were cached Promptfoo reruns and not fresh throughput evidence.

stream22QwenNoCacheFullSuite.result: qwen/qwen3.5-9b@gpu_offload no-cache current-suite 40-case run timed out at 1200052 ms before pass totals; stderr confirmed cache disabled and 40 test cases started.

comparisons.stream28NarrowDelta: Stream 28 adds a completed, filtered, Promptfoo no-cache qwen build-synthetic-smoke surface: eval_failed 0/4 in 261012 ms with cached tokens 0. It closes only the no completed qwen no-cache row at all evidence gap.

runtimeAfter.lmsPs: No models are currently loaded after explicit lms unload --all.

closed: Narrow qwen no-cache single-task evidence gap: there is now a completed Promptfoo-backed qwen no-cache build-synthetic-smoke row.
notClosed: Full 40-case qwen no-cache current-suite throughput remains incomplete.
The Stream 28 row failed 0/4 and reported no prompt/completion tokens because Promptfoo errored on undefined output before normal scoring.

Qwen quality acceptance, final 3-solid selection, broad/full local matrix coverage, 31B/31B-QAT practical proof, broad partial-profile coverage, subjective user review, and final verifier audit remain open.
